title: Finance — Midterm Review
description: Flagship demo: TVM, NPV/IRR, CAPM, WACC, and decision process — agent build → Import JSON → Export PDF.

outline.title: Finance Midterm — Cheat Sheet
outline.notes: Topic pack: finance-midterm (flagship agent → Studio → PDF path)

blocks.title: Accept / reject rules
blocks.markdown:
| Metric | Accept if | Watch out |
|--------|-----------|----------|
| NPV | NPV > 0 | Scale / mutually exclusive |
| IRR | IRR > r | Multiple IRRs, reinvestment |
| PI | PI > 1 | Capital rationing |
| Payback | ≤ cutoff | Ignores TVM / late CF |

blocks.title: Capital budgeting flow
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Estimate free cash flows] --> B[Choose discount rate r]
  B --> C[Compute NPV / IRR / PI]
  C --> D{NPV > 0?}
  D -->|Yes| E[Rank & fund]
  D -->|No| F[Reject or rework CF]
  E --> G[Sensitivity / scenarios]

blocks.title: Midterm symbols
blocks.markdown:
| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|--------|
| r, r_E | Discount / equity cost |
| R_f | Risk-free rate |
| β | Systematic risk vs market |
| C_t | Cash flow at t |
| t_c | Corporate tax rate |
| w_E, w_D | Target capital weights |

blocks.title: Exam problem checklist
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Read: CF timing] --> B[Identify: PV / NPV / CAPM / WACC]
  B --> C[Pick formula]
  C --> D[Plug numbers carefully]
  D --> E[Units: % vs decimal]
  E --> F[Sanity: sign & magnitude]

blocks.title: Quick tips
blocks.markdown:
| Pitfall | Fix |
|---------|-----|
| Annuity vs perpetuity | Finite n → annuity formula |
| Beginning vs end of period | Annuity due: ×(1+r) |
| Real vs nominal r | Match CF inflation treatment |
| Equity vs project r | CAPM → r_E; ops CF → WACC |
